message:
feat(rchd): enhance daemon with improved health, reload, and selection

Updates to the rch daemon (rchd) for better operational reliability:

api.rs:
- Extended API surface for new telemetry endpoints

health.rs:
- Improved health check response detail

main.rs:
- Updated initialization sequence
- Better signal handling integration

reload.rs:
- Enhanced configuration reload without restart
- Graceful worker pool updates
- Improved logging during reload operations

selection.rs:
- Smarter worker selection algorithm
- Better load distribution across available workers
- Affinity hints for project-to-worker mapping

These improvements make rchd more resilient in production deployments
with multiple concurrent compilation requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
